rules.rule_text:
rule shellshock_generic
{
	meta:
		author = "Adam Burt"

	strings:
		$starter = "() { "
		$alt1 = "(a)=>"
		$alt2 = ":; } ;"
		$att1 = "HOLD Flooding"
		$att2 = "JUNK Flooding"
		$att4 = "PONG!"
		$att5 = "/bin/busybox"
		$att6 = "SCANNER"

	condition:
		($starter and any of ( $alt* ) ) or ( all of ( $att* ) )
}
